nasb.text: Now the same night it came about that the Lord said to him, “Arise, go down against the camp, for I have given it into your hands.

esv.text: That same night the Lord said to him, “Arise, go down against the camp, for I have given it into your hand.

cnv.text: 當夜，耶和華對基甸說：“起來，下去攻營，因為我已經把他們交在你手裡了。

ccb.text: 当天晚上，耶和华吩咐基甸说：“起来，下去攻打敌营吧！我已把敌人交在你手中了。
